name: same_supplier_company_name_vs_proprietor_name_sing
description: Same supplier, company name vs proprietor name, single thread
expected_output: Single supplier entity: Suresh / S.K. Enterprises. One delivery task: Maal expected tomorrow morning.
pass_criteria: PASS: Single supplier entity. FAIL: Separate records for 'S.K. Enterprises' and 'Suresh ji'.
challenge: Company name (S.K. Enterprises) and proprietor name (Suresh ji) used interchangeably in same thread.
notes: Company + proprietor name variant - common in Indian SME context
